title: Re-sequence jit-breakdown for the bracket
description:
Re-sequence the jit-breakdown skill to consume an approved plan, create the breakdown node, draft children in backlog, wire the source and sink spine, and run the coverage-preview gate. Replaces the parent-centric wiring of the current breakdown helper.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] Breaking down a breakable container creates the breakdown node (brackets label, coverage gate) depending on the planning node, and drafts children in backlog.
- [ ] Source children depend on the breakdown node and sink children gate the container, in reduced form.
- [ ] The skill does not reuse the parent-centric breakdown wiring.
